field.name: count
field.help: How many unique random codes to generate

field.name: code_length
field.help: Number of random characters per code (min 4, recommended 8)

field.name: prefix
field.help: Prefix prepended to every code. Leave blank for numbers only.

sheet.div:
Will generate
−
+ 1
single-use codes. Already-existing codes are skipped automatically.
Generates random single-use codes (e.g. A3X9K2M1). Each code can only be redeemed once in POS.

field.name: warehouse_ids
field.placeholder: Leave empty to apply in ALL warehouses…

group.div: ℹ️ No warehouse selected — this offer will be visible in all POS sessions regardless of their warehouse.
🏭 This offer is restricted to the selected warehouse(s) only. POS sessions linked to other warehouses will not see this offer.

field.name: coupon_code
field.placeholder: Optional — or use generated codes below
